CeraVe Hydrating Cream To Foam Cleanser 237ml

CeraVe Hydrating Cream To Foam Cleanser starts as a smooth cream and transforms into a rich, hydrating foam on contact with water. It removes impurities and makeup while maintaining the skin's natural moisture balance with ceramides and hyaluronic acid.

Key Benefits

  • Unique cream-to-foam texture for an indulgent cleanse
  • Removes makeup, dirt, and excess oil thoroughly
  • Ceramides 1, 3 & 6-II replenish the skin barrier
  • Hyaluronic acid retains moisture during cleansing
  • Non-comedogenic, fragrance-free, soap-free
  • Suitable for normal to dry and sensitive skin

How to Use

Apply to wet hands or face. Massage to transform into foam. Rinse thoroughly. Use morning and/or night.

Available at Emart — authentic CeraVe in Bangladesh. Nationwide Cash on Delivery.
